query:
SELECT p.sku, p.name, p.manufacturer, vm.name as make, vmo.name as model, 
       pvf.yearFrom, pvf.yearTo, pc.name as category, pg.name as part_group
FROM part_vehicle_fitments pvf
JOIN parts p ON pvf.partId = p.id
JOIN vehicle_makes vm ON pvf.makeId = vm.id
JOIN vehicle_models vmo ON pvf.modelId = vmo.id
LEFT JOIN part_categories pc ON p.categoryId = pc.id
LEFT JOIN part_groups pg ON p.partGroupId = pg.id
WHERE vm.name = 'TOYOTA' AND vmo.name = 'RAV4'
LIMIT 10;
command:

       pvf.yearFrom, pvf.yearTo, pc.name as category, pg.name as part_group
FROM part_vehicle_fitments pvf
JOIN parts p ON pvf.partId = p.id
JOIN vehicle_makes vm ON pvf.makeId = vm.id
JOIN vehicle_models vmo ON pvf.modelId = vmo.id
LEFT JOIN part_categories pc ON p.categoryId = pc.id
LEFT JOIN part_groups pg ON p.partGroupId = pg.id
WHERE vm.name = 'TOYOTA' AND vmo.name = 'RAV4'
LIMIT 10;
